name: dpp-event
description: DPP Event Log Service: EPCIS to IOTA notarization pipeline

scripts.build: npm ci && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.build:quick: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clear:graph && npm run dev
scripts.test: tsx --test src/validate.test.ts src/hash.test.ts src/classify.test.ts src/transform.test.ts src/corsConfig.test.ts src/wwwRedirect.test.ts src/app.test.ts
scripts.clear:cache: npm run clear:graph && npm run clear:build
